narrative: US-Iran tensions and Fed hike bets underpin the dollar as gold struggles near $4,000 — gold higher +0.08%; equities -0.51%; DXY +0.01%; VIX 18.2. USD/JPY holds at 162.40 as a 275bp carry advantage offsets Japan FinMin Katayama’s neutral stance on BoJ policy. NZD leads G10 (+1.28% avg) on RBNZ hike bias, while EUR/USD at 1.1443 faces a 150bp Fed-ECB deficit and negative data surprises. Watch Eurozone CPI at 09:00 UTC for ECB policy cues.
